name: Maria Schmidt
biography: Maria Schmidt is a certified SAP Business ByDesign consultant with 18 years of experience in financial process transformation for mid-market companies across the DACH region. She has led over 40 ByD implementations and is a frequent speaker at SAP events.

name: James Liu
biography: James Liu is a principal architect at a leading SAP partner firm and the author of several acclaimed guides on SAP ByD integration. He specialises in API-based connectivity between SAP Business ByDesign and third-party platforms.

name: Elena Rossi
biography: Elena Rossi brings 12 years of CRM and sales-process expertise on SAP Business ByDesign. Previously a sales director herself, she translates real-world sales challenges into practical SAP ByD configuration and adoption strategies.

name: Kenji Tanaka
biography: Kenji Tanaka is a Tokyo-based SAP ByD specialist focused on manufacturing and supply-chain operations for Japanese SMEs expanding globally. He holds multiple SAP certifications and contributes regularly to the SAP Community.
